3527654962.title: Orange Almond Loaf Cake 600gm
3527654962.detail_text: Brighten your day with our citrusy Orange Almond Loaf Cake that's made with fresh whole oranges, ground almonds, and a hint of honey for sweetness. Evoking memories of bitter marmalade, this cake is the perfect companion for your afternoon tea or a quick, delightful snack. Experience the sunshine in every bite. ALL NATURAL INGREDIENTS. GLUTEN FREE. NO REFINED FLOUR. LOW IN SUGAR. DAIRY FREE. GRAIN FREE. Ingredients: Almond Meal, Whole Oranges, Whole Eggs, Almonds, Honey, Sea Salt, Baking Powder, Black Sesame. Allergens: Tree Nuts (Almonds, Pistachios), Eggs, Coconut. Made in a kitchen where sesame, peanuts and eggs are also handled. Storage Instructions: Keep your cake fresh by storing it in the refrigerator. Our cakes are baked using all-natural ingredients and contain no additives, hence we recommend consuming them within 5 to 7 days. WHY GLUTEN FREE? Gluten is a protein found in many grains including wheat, barley, spelt, rye, and sometimes in oats. We are consuming more gluten (and wheat) than ever before as it is found in so many of the processed and packaged foods we can buy these days, including breads, cakes, cereals, cookies, crackers, pasta, pizza, sauces and desserts. Many people have a sensitivity/intolerance to gluten and suffer from an array of symptoms after consuming gluten, including stomach aches, bloating, diarrhoea, constipation, fatigue or headaches. These symptoms may be severe or mild depending and many people don’t even know that these digestive issues they experience are linked to the gluten in their food. Even if you don't have a gluten sensitivity, most people generally feel better when they reduce the amount of gluten in their diet. Our approach to gluten is simple - unless you have a diagnosed gluten intolerance or are celiac, we believe there is room for some gluten products in your diet in moderation. Lets be honest, there aren't many better things in life that the smells of a freshly baked baguette! But there are many foods we consume that don't need to contain gluten and this is where The Whole Kitchen products fit in. We are constantly challenging ourselves to get creative with new naturally gluten free ingredients that are pleasing on the palate and will substitute the gluten rich versions in our sweet treats, snacks and granolas without compromising on taste. OUR STORY The Whole Kitchen brand stands for real food - providing genuine health, great taste, and natural goodness, always striving to help people thrive through, and reignite their love for real food.

Even if you don't have a gluten sensitivity, most people generally feel better when they reduce the amount of gluten in their diet. Our approach to gluten is simple - unless you have a diagnosed gluten intolerance or are celiac, we believe there is room for some gluten products in your diet in moderation. Lets be honest, there aren't many better things in life that the smells of a freshly baked baguette! But there are many foods we consume that don't need to contain gluten and this is where The Whole Kitchen products fit in. We are constantly challenging ourselves to get creative with new naturally gluten free ingredients that are pleasing on the palate and will substitute the gluten rich versions in our sweet treats, snacks and granolas without compromising on taste. OUR STORY The Whole Kitchen brand stands for real food - providing genuine health, great taste, and natural goodness, always striving to help people thrive through, and reignite their love for real food.

WHY GLUTEN FREE?

Gluten is a protein found in many grains including wheat, barley, spelt, rye, and sometimes in oats. We are consuming more gluten (and wheat) than ever before as it is found in so many of the processed and packaged foods we can buy these days, including breads, cakes, cereals, cookies, crackers, pasta, pizza, sauces and desserts.

Many people have a sensitivity/intolerance to gluten and suffer from an array of symptoms after consuming gluten, including stomach aches, bloating, diarrhoea, constipation, fatigue or headaches. These symptoms may be severe or mild depending and many people don’t even know that these digestive issues they experience are linked to the gluten in their food. Even if you don't have a gluten sensitivity, most people generally feel better when they reduce the amount of gluten in their diet.  

Our approach to gluten is simple - unless you have a diagnosed gluten intolerance or are celiac, we believe there is room for some gluten products in your diet in moderation. Lets be honest, there aren't many better things in life that the smells of a freshly baked baguette! But there are many foods we consume that don't need to contain gluten and this is where The Whole Kitchen products fit in. We are constantly challenging ourselves to get creative with new naturally gluten free ingredients that are pleasing on the palate and will substitute the gluten rich versions in our sweet treats, snacks and granolas without compromising on taste.

3504962417.title: LPD - Pre Rolled Shortcrust Pastry Dough/Belle France
3504962417.detail_text: BRAND : BELLE FRANCE Product Description : Indulge in the authentic French bakery experience right at your home with Belle France Shortbread Pastry. This premium quality pastry dough is created from a blend of top-notch ingredients, including wheat flour, butter concentrate, and a hint of lemon juice, ensuring a rich, buttery taste with a perfect crumbly texture. Each ingredient is carefully chosen to guarantee excellent results, whether you're creating a delectable tart or a sumptuous pizza. Being free from artificial preservatives, this pastry dough is safe and healthy for all, though it may contain traces of egg. Ingredient : Wheat Flour, Butter Concentrate (18.9%) ((Butter, Coloring: Beta Carotene)), Water, Salt, Sugar, Ethyl Alcohol, Citrus Fiber, Lemon Juice Concentrate. May Contain Traces Of Egg. Allergens : Eggs, Gluten, Milk Country of Origin : FRANCE How to Use : Belle France Shortbread Pastry is super easy to use. Simply remove it from the packaging, and it’s ready to roll out into your desired shape and thickness. It provides an excellent base for both sweet and savory dishes. Be it a classic French tart, a mouth-watering pizza, or a comforting pot pie, this Shortbread Pastry will elevate your dishes to new culinary heights. Suggested Recipes / Uses : The versatility of Belle France Shortbread Pastry allows for a myriad of delightful recipes. 1) Create a classic French Quiche Lorraine, filled with creamy cheese, smoky bacon, and fresh herbs. 2) For dessert lovers, a tangy Lemon Tart or a decadent Chocolate Ganache Tart would be irresistible. 3) Transform your favorite pizza recipe by using this pastry as a base for an added buttery, flaky texture. 4) Or, make a comforting Chicken or Vegetable Pot Pie for those cozy dinner nights. #Belle France Shortbread Pastry#French bakery experience#premium quality pastry dough#buttery taste#crumbly texture#versatile pastry dough#ideal for tarts and pizzas#easy to use pastry dough.
